titleStmt.title: SII 37.37: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 37. (A.R. No. 379 of 1938-39.) Guṟṟampāḍu, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Vishṇu temple on the river bank.
This is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Āśvija ba. 5 corresponding to 1531 A.D., October 1, Sunday.

It records the gift of the toll income (sunkham) of Guṟampāṭi-grāma made by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tirumalayya, son of Jagatāpi Sōmalrāju to god Kēsava-perumāl of the village for conducting the dasami mahōtsavas for the merit of his overlord Salakarāju Timmarāju. The village Guṟṟampādu, situated in the Chennūru-nāyankara, which was administered by Salakarāju Timmarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1453 Agunēṭi kharasamvatsara Āśvī
jaba 5 lu . śrī manmahārājādhi rāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapra
tāpa śrī[Acyuta] rāyadēva mahārāyalu pṛdhvirājyaṁśēyu
cuṁnu sakalarāju tirumala rājuṁgāriki nāyaṁkkarānaku
pāliṁcinacennūrināyaṁkarānaku jelleguṟaṁpāṭi grāmaṁ
lu rājuṁ grāmaṁ jagatāpikāmarā
malrāju māku gāri
guṟaṁpāṭi nāyaṁkrānakuṁbāliṁccina nimityaṁ
Āguṟaṁpāṭi kēśava perumāḷlaku dasami mahōtsavānaku śrī mannu
mahā maṁḍalēśvara jagatāpi sōmalrājukomāruṁḍu tirumalayya
gāru tama yēlika sakala rāju tiṁmmarājuṁ gāriki puṇyaṁgā
guṟaṁpāṭi staḷaṁsuṁkhaṁ guṟṟaṁpāṭi kēśavaperumāḷla daśami
mahatvālaku dāravōśiyistimiṁgāna Aṁdalistāniku
lu daśami mahēstavālaku naḍupukonidi Aṁcu
payyeśaṁ nayivēdyaṁ . camaru Arumacinālaku camaru
kussa¨rha 1 rūka lekkanaḍupukonēdi . svadattādviguṇaṁpuṁ
ṇyaṁparadattānu pālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣṣalaṁbhavētṁ . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 37.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
